title: Daily Review
description: Capture wins, blockers, lessons, and gratitude, then turn them into a tighter next-day focus plan.

placeholders.wins: One item per line, such as: closed a tricky bug, clarified a blurry scope
placeholders.blockers: One item per line, such as: waiting on API confirmation, context switching
placeholders.lesson: For example: hardest task first in the morning worked better
placeholders.gratitude: For example: a teammate jumped in and validated the fix

generated.summary: You logged {{wins}} wins and {{blockers}} blockers today, with overall energy at “{{energy}}”. Keep the rhythm, then focus the next session on one visible step forward.
generated.empty: Add a few notes from today and this panel will shape them into an actionable review.
generated.applyLesson: Turn today's lesson into tomorrow's action: {{item}}
generated.keepRhythm: Schedule one easy-to-start task first to create momentum
generated.protectFocus: Protect one uninterrupted block for the highest-value task
generated.endWithPlan: Close tomorrow with another five-minute review so the loop stays tight
